ModMetaData.name: Vanilla Plants Expanded - Flowers
ModMetaData.author: Oskar Potocki, Sarg Bjornson
ModMetaData.description:
Vanilla Plants Expanded - Flowers adds a variety of new, decorative flora to your colony, enriching your gardens with a dynamic, season-based blooming system. Here is what you can expect:
- Flowers follow specific blooming schedules throughout the year. During these periods, they reach peak beauty, while outside these times, they appear as standard, basic plants.
- Flowers are not static; they age over time. Older plants receive stacking beauty bonuses, meaning a well-tended garden becomes progressively more stunning as your colony matures.
- Be prepared for winter, when many flowers shed their leaves and enter a dormant state, providing negative beauty. You will need to manage your garden's health through changing temperatures.
